text.title: Aesthetic and Minimalist Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold AND no Skip-If disqualifier is true?

branch.question: Are required inputs present AND aligned with the rubric?
